summary: Iteration 120: Context-Based Cut Suggestions, Inventory Receiving Module, Menu Engineering Matrix. All 20 backend tests PASSED (100%). Frontend panels verified working with all tabs, forms, and data displays.

minor.issue: Soup context preference list uses 'diced' but cut names have 'dice' - causes 'Peeled whole' to appear first instead of diced cuts
minor.fix: Change CONTEXT_PREFERENCES soup list from ['diced', ...] to ['dice', ...] in yield_database.py line 291

action_items: Optional: Fix soup context preference from 'diced' to 'dice' in yield_database.py CONTEXT_PREFERENCES
critical_code_review_comments: Context-based cut suggestions working for salad (julienne first), steak (center cut/filet first), grill (whole/spears first)
Inventory seed creates 132 items from YIELD_DB with proper storage locations by category
Inventory receiving updates on_hand via regex match against inventory_items name field
Menu Engineering Matrix uses Kasavana-Smith classification with simulated sales mix data for 3 outlets

All data-testid attributes present for testing: inventory-panel, inv-dashboard, inv-tab-*, receive-form, submit-receiving-btn, receive-result, inventory-items, receipts-list, menu-engineering-panel, outlet-select
seed_data_creation: Inventory seeded via POST /api/inventory/seed (132 items from YIELD_DB). Test receipt created with TEST_Onion Yellow.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 120 added: (1) Context-based cut suggestions at /api/yields/suggest-cuts with context param (soup, salad, steak, grill, etc). (2) Inventory Receiving module at /api/inventory/* with seed, dashboard, items, receive, receipts, adjust endpoints. Frontend panel under FINANCIAL & PURCHASING > Inventory Receiving. (3) Menu Engineering Matrix at /api/menu-eng-matrix/* with matrix and outlets endpoints. Frontend panel under CULINARY OPERATIONS > Menu Engineering. Sales mix data is SIMULATED (would come from real POS in production).
